description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a global variable SILENT and uses the default runner image. Add a hidden .build_template job with a before_script that runs `cat /etc/os-release` and `uname -a`, and a script that runs `make $MAKE_OPTIONS`, `ldd ./array_hash_map_example`, `./array_hash_map_example`, and `./array_hash_map_tests`. Define clang_arm64_build, clang_debian_jessie_build, clang_debian_sid_build, clang_ubuntu_artful_build, and clang_ubuntu_zesty_build jobs that inherit the template, run in the default test stage, are tagged respectively with arm64, jessie, sid, artful, and zesty, set CXX to /usr/bin/clang++, and set MAKE_OPTIONS=USE_ADDRESS_SANITIZER=1 for all except the arm64 job. Define gcc_arm64_build, gcc_debian_jessie_build, gcc_debian_sid_build, gcc_ubuntu_artful_build, and gcc_ubuntu_zesty_build jobs that also inherit the template, run in the default test stage, are tagged with arm64, jessie, sid, artful, and zesty, set CXX to /usr/bin/clang++ for the arm64 job (or leave default for others), and set MAKE_OPTIONS=USE_ADDRESS_SANITIZER=1 for all except the arm64 job. All jobs have no artifacts, caches, or special rules and simply execute the inherited commands.
